metadata.description: The standout-* family of craft plugins for Claude Code: distinctive design, and a polished notification experience.

plugins.name: standout-design
plugins.description: Build standout frontends for websites and apps with real craft: bold art direction, distinctive typography, high-impact motion, and accessibility, none of the generic AI look.

plugins.name: standout-notifications
plugins.description: Know what Claude Code is doing at a glance: iTerm tab colors that track working / waiting / idle state, plus an R2-D2 sound when Claude needs you. Includes a /sound toggle.
